steps.t: Orc-arrows can be found near the East Arch of the Twenty-first Hall. You should collect Orc-arrows to show to the dwarves of the Twenty-first Hall.
Orc-arrows can be found near the East Arch of the Twenty-first Hall. You should collect Orc-arrows to show to the dwarves of the Twenty-first Hall.
You have stowed away many Orc-arrows to show to Mögr in the Twenty-first Hall. You should return to Mögr with the arrows you collected.
